packages.name: linux-hardened
packages.summary: Hardened Linux kernel with security patches and reduced attack surface.
packages.detail: V0rtexOS ships the Arch linux-hardened kernel with additional sysctl and module blacklists. It prioritizes security mitigations (PTI, slab hardening) over maximum throughput.

packages.name: linux-hardened-headers
packages.summary: Kernel and boot support component: linux hardened headers.
packages.detail: **linux-hardened-headers** is part of the official V0rtexOS package manifest (category: Kernel & Firmware). It is installed from Arch Linux and BlackArch repositories during the ISO build. For upstream documentation, see the Arch Linux package page or man pages on a running system (`pacman -Qi linux-hardened-headers`).
